creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
If I run shutter from the command line (Konsole, csh), it's OK. 

If I use e.g. the application launcher menu to launch Shutter: 

- there's a crash of perl at the moment of capture. 

----

grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ % pkg query '%o %v %R' perl5 shutter
lang/perl5.28 5.28.1 FreeBSD
deskutils/shutter 0.93.1_5 FreeBSD
grahamperrin@momh167-gjp4-8570p:~ % date ; uname -v
Tue  1 Jan 2019 19:52:01 GMT
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r342466 GENERIC-NODEBUG
